plugins.name: agentic-testing
plugins.description: Opinionated guides for testing software when AI agents write most of the code — what to test, how to shape the feedback loop, and how to guard against agent-specific test failures.

plugins.name: crtr-dev
plugins.description: Canonical guides for authoring and developing crtr plugins, marketplaces, and skills.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Skills for spec-driven development — write specs, then review specs/designs/plans/requirements against each other.

plugins.name: claude-authoring
plugins.description: Guides for authoring Claude Code artifacts — CLAUDE.md files, hooks, rules, skills, commands, and scripts.

plugins.name: llm-app-authoring
plugins.description: Guides for building LLM applications — prompting, context management, structured output, evals, tool design, multi-agent orchestration, and more.

plugins.name: knowledge-capture
plugins.description: Skills for capturing knowledge through interviews, peer collaboration, breakthrough thinking, and session takeaways.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Skills for web development workflows — frontend product design and UX consultancy.
